title: AdvancedAdvancementSave
description: Save player's advancement data files and scoreboard file when player has completed any advancement criteria
body:
This mod would be save player's advancement data files and scoreboard file`(scoreboard.dat)` when player has completed any advancement criteria on multi-thread with thread safety works. so it doesn't cause server lag directly.

This mod is made for [BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack) Speedrunners.
